case_title: RONALD GOLASZEWSKI VS. KIMBERLEE KAY DICKERSON DDS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-20-2020 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JAN-19-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 W. TRUPEK (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,892.92 FILED BY GOLASZEWSKI, RONALD AS TO DEFENDANT DICKERSON DDS, KIMBERLEE KAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-20-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CONTINUED FOR A PROGRESS REPORT: PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-19-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-18-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF RONALD GOLASZEWSKI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KIMBERLEE KAY DICKERSON,DDS IS NOT PRESENT DISCLOSURE IS MADE. . PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT PRIOR TO COURT. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE MAR-18-2021 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES AT THE MARCH HEARING THE MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. THE PLAINTIFF IN THIS MATTER REQUESTED THAT THE DEFENDANT RECEIVE THIS PROGRESS REPORT NOTIFICATION (PRIOR TO THE FILING PROOF OF SERVICE). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDCE. CASE SETTLED. NO APPEARANCES.
